name: sharepoint-knowledge
description: Cognigy knowledge connector extension for SharePoint document libraries.

scripts.zip: tar cfz sharepoint-knowledge-v${npm_package_version}.tar.gz build/* package.json package-lock.json README.md icon.png
scripts.zip:source: rm -f sharepoint-knowledge-source-v${npm_package_version}.zip && zip -r sharepoint-knowledge-source-v${npm_package_version}.zip README.md DEVELOPMENT.md icon.png package.json package-lock.json scripts src tsconfig.json tslint.json
scripts.build: npm run transpile && npm run lint && npm run smoke && npm run zip

author: PAteam
